titles.title: Let Not Your Heart Be Troubled

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Let not your weary heart be troubled, Believe in God, believe in Me; For in My Father’s house are mansions, I will prepare a place for thee.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Let not your heart be troubled, Let not your heart be troubled; Let not your heart be troubled, Nor let it be afraid.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Let not your peace in calm assurance Be ruffled by the storms of life; But soldier-like, with firm endurance, Just glory in the holy strife.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Let not your hope be dimmed with doubting, Let not life’s burdens foil your grace; But in each conflict vict’ry shouting, Like he who runs to win a race.
